_rationale: Schema drift between Go and C++ status JSON, intentionally accepted on the path toward Go retirement. Go emits goroutine/runtime-arena metrics; C++ emits OS-level RSS + thread metrics. C++ output is the canonical forward shape; Go-only fields are tolerated for as long as both binaries are referenced.

tiers._rationale_ignore: BASE_IGNORE_NON_DETERMINISM applies implicitly (pid/timestamp/elapsed_ms/version/jsonrpc envelope etc.). memory_rss_mb + num_threads are C++-only OS metrics; memory_alloc_mb/heap_mb/total_mb/num_goroutines are Go-only runtime metrics. Both sides are accepted divergence — see _rationale.
